# Registry Module Tags API reference

-> **Note:** Registry tagging is available in HCP Terraform. Ensure that the registry tagging feature is enabled for your organization before using these endpoints.

## Overview

The HCP Terraform Registry Tagging API allows you to categorize and manage registry artifacts (modules, providers, and component configs) with key-value tags. Tags enable you to:

- Organize and categorize your registry artifacts
- Filter and discover artifacts based on project tags
- Control artifact usage based on environment tags
- Implement governance and compliance policies

Tags are applied at two levels:
- **Artifact-level tags (Project Tags)**: Applied to the entire module, provider, or component config, inherited by all versions
- **Version-level tags (Environment Tags)**: Applied to specific versions, allowing fine-grained control over version access

The following table lists all the endpoints for managing registry tagging in your organization's private registry:

| Method | Path | Action |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings` | Create a tag binding for a registry module (artifact-level). |
| POST | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/versions/:version/tag-bindings` | Create a tag binding for a specific module version (version-level). |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings` | List all tag bindings for a registry module and its versions. |
| DELETE | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings/:tag_binding_id` | Delete a tag binding from a registry module. |
| POST | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings` | Create a tag binding for a registry provider. |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings` | List tag bindings for a registry provider. |
| DELETE | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings/:tag_binding_id` | Delete a tag binding from a registry provider. |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules?filter[tags]=key:value,key2:value2` | Query registry modules by tag filters (AND logic for multiple tags). |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/tag-bindings` | List tag bindings across the organization (filterable by taggable-type). |


## Add Tags to a Registry Module

[](#add-tags-to-a-registry-module)

Creates a new tag binding for a registry module in your organization's private registry.

`POST /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization that owns the registry module. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. For private registries, this should be `private`. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the module (typically your organization name for private modules). |
| `:name` | The name of the module. |
| `:system` | The provider system (e.g., `aws`, `azure`, `gcp`). |

-> **Note:** This endpoint requires the `write:modules` scope and registry tagging permissions. You must access it with a [user token](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/users-teams-organizations/users#api-tokens) or [team token](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/users-teams-organizations/api-tokens#team-api-tokens).

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [201](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/201) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "tag-bindings"`) | Successfully created the tag binding |
| [400](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Invalid tag key or value format |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized to manage registry tags |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Registry module not found |
| [422](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/422) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Malformed request body or duplicate tag key |

### Request Body

[](#request-body)

This POST endpoint requires a JSON object with the following properties as a request payload.

Properties without a default value are required.

| Key path | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `data.type` | string |  | Must be `"tag-bindings"`. |
| `data.attributes.key` | string |  | The tag key. Maximum 128 characters. Valid characters: letters, numbers, spaces, and `_.=+-@:` |
| `data.attributes.value` | string |  | The tag value. Maximum 256 characters. Valid characters: letters, numbers, spaces, and `_.=+-@:` |

### Sample Payload

[](#sample-payload)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "tag-bindings",
    "attributes": {
      "key": "project",
      "value": "platform-team"
    }
  }
}
```

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request)

```bash
curl \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json" \
  --request POST \
  --data @payload.json \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "tb-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h",
    "type": "tag-bindings",
    "attributes": {
      "key": "project",
      "value": "platform-team",
      "created_at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
    },
    "relationships": {
      "organization": {
        "data": {
          "id": "org-abc123",
          "type": "organizations"
        }
      }
    },
    "links": {
      "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings/tb-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h"
    }
  }
}
```

## Add Tags to a Registry Module Version

[](#add-tags-to-a-registry-module-version)

Creates a new tag binding for a specific version of a registry module.

`POST /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/versions/:version/tag-bindings`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization that owns the registry module. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. For private registries, this should be `private`. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the module. |
| `:name` | The name of the module. |
| `:system` | The provider system (e.g., `aws`, `azure`, `gcp`). |
| `:version` | The semantic version of the module (e.g., `1.0.0`, `2.3.1`). |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [201](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/201) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "tag-bindings"`) | Successfully created the version tag binding |
| [400](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Invalid tag key or value format |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized to manage registry tags |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Module version not found |
| [422](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/422) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Malformed request body or duplicate tag key |

### Request Body

[](#request-body-1)

This POST endpoint requires a JSON object with the following properties as a request payload.

| Key path | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `data.type` | string |  | Must be `"tag-bindings"`. |
| `data.attributes.key` | string |  | The tag key. For version-level tags, reserved keys like `environment`, `compliance`, or `status` are recommended. Maximum 128 characters. |
| `data.attributes.value` | string |  | The tag value (e.g., `production`, `staging`, `development`). Maximum 256 characters. |

### Sample Payload

[](#sample-payload-1)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "tag-bindings",
    "attributes": {
      "key": "environment",
      "value": "production"
    }
  }
}
```

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-1)

```bash
curl \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json" \
  --request POST \
  --data @payload.json \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/versions/1.2.0/tag-bindings
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-1)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "tb-2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i",
    "type": "tag-bindings",
    "attributes": {
      "key": "environment",
      "value": "production",
      "created_at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
    },
    "relationships": {
      "organization": {
        "data": {
          "id": "org-abc123",
          "type": "organizations"
        }
      }
    },
    "links": {
      "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/versions/1.2.0/tag-bindings/tb-2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i"
    }
  }
}
```

## List Tags for a Registry Module

[](#list-tags-for-a-registry-module)

Lists all tags assigned to a registry module and its versions.

`GET /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. For private registries, use `private`. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the module. |
| `:name` | The name of the module. |
| `:system` | The provider system. |

### Query Parameters

[](#query-parameters)

This endpoint supports pagination [with standard URL query parameters](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#query-parameters).

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `filter[taggable-type]` | **Optional.** Comma-separated list of taggable types to filter. Valid values: `registry-modules`, `registry-module-versions`. |
| `page[number]` | **Optional.** If omitted, the endpoint will return the first page. |
| `page[size]` | **Optional.** If omitted, the endpoint will return 20 tag bindings per page. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [200](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/200) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "tag-bindings"`) | The request was successful |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Module not found or user unauthorized |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-2)

```bash
curl \
  --request GET \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-2)

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "tb-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h",
      "type": "tag-bindings",
      "attributes": {
        "key": "project",
        "value": "platform-team",
        "created_at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
      },
      "links": {
        "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings/tb-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "tb-2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i",
      "type": "tag-bindings",
      "attributes": {
        "key": "team",
        "value": "infrastructure",
        "created_at": "2026-06-12T15:31:00Z"
      },
      "links": {
        "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings/tb-2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i"
      }
    }
  ],
  "links": {
    "self": "https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings?page%5Bnumber%5D=1&page%5Bsize%5D=20",
    "first": "https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings?page%5Bnumber%5D=1&page%5Bsize%5D=20",
    "prev": null,
    "next": null,
    "last": "https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings?page%5Bnumber%5D=1&page%5Bsize%5D=20"
  },
  "meta": {
    "pagination": {
      "current-page": 1,
      "page-size": 20,
      "prev-page": null,
      "next-page": null,
      "total-pages": 1,
      "total-count": 2
    }
  }
}
```

## Delete a Tag from a Registry Module

[](#delete-a-tag-from-a-registry-module)

Removes a tag binding from a registry module.

`DELETE /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings/:tag_binding_id`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the module. |
| `:name` | The name of the module. |
| `:system` | The provider system. |
| `:tag_binding_id` | The ID of the tag binding to delete. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [204](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/204) | Empty response | Successfully deleted the tag binding |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized to delete tags |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Tag binding not found |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-3)

```bash
curl \
  --request DELETE \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/tag-bindings/tb-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h
```

## Add Tags to a Registry Provider

[](#add-tags-to-a-registry-provider)

Creates a new tag binding for a registry provider in your organization's private registry.

`POST /organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization that owns the provider. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. For private registries, this should be `private`. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the provider (typically your organization name). |
| `:name` | The name of the provider (e.g., `aws`, `azure`, `custom-provider`). |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [201](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/201) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "tag-bindings"`) | Successfully created the tag binding |
| [400](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Invalid tag key or value format |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized to manage registry tags |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Registry provider not found |

### Request Body

[](#request-body-2)

This POST endpoint requires a JSON object with the following properties as a request payload.

| Key path | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `data.type` | string |  | Must be `"tag-bindings"`. |
| `data.attributes.key` | string |  | The tag key. Maximum 128 characters. |
| `data.attributes.value` | string |  | The tag value. Maximum 256 characters. |

### Sample Payload

[](#sample-payload-2)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "tag-bindings",
    "attributes": {
      "key": "provider-type",
      "value": "custom"
    }
  }
}
```

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-4)

```bash
curl \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json" \
  --request POST \
  --data @payload.json \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-providers/private/my-organization/custom-provider/tag-bindings
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-3)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "tb-3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j",
    "type": "tag-bindings",
    "attributes": {
      "key": "provider-type",
      "value": "custom",
      "created_at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
    },
    "relationships": {
      "organization": {
        "data": {
          "id": "org-abc123",
          "type": "organizations"
        }
      }
    },
    "links": {
      "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-providers/private/my-organization/custom-provider/tag-bindings/tb-3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j"
    }
  }
}
```

## List Tags for a Registry Provider

[](#list-tags-for-a-registry-provider)

Lists all tags assigned to a registry provider.

`GET /organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the provider. |
| `:name` | The name of the provider. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [200](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/200) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "tag-bindings"`) | The request was successful |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Provider not found |

## Delete a Tag from a Registry Provider

[](#delete-a-tag-from-a-registry-provider)

Removes a tag binding from a registry provider.

`DELETE /organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings/:tag_binding_id`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the provider. |
| `:name` | The name of the provider. |
| `:tag_binding_id` | The ID of the tag binding to delete. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [204](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/204) | Empty response | Successfully deleted the tag binding |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized to delete tags |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Tag binding not found |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-6)

```bash
curl \
  --request DELETE \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-providers/private/my-organization/custom-provider/tag-bindings/tb-3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j
```

## Query Registry Modules by Tags

[](#query-registry-modules-by-tags)

Lists registry modules filtered by one or more tag criteria. When multiple tags are specified, only modules matching ALL tags are returned (AND logic).

`GET /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules?filter[tags]=key:value,key2:value2`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |

### Query Parameters

[](#query-parameters-1)

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `filter[tags]` | **Optional.** Comma-separated list of tag filters in the format `key:value`. Multiple filters use AND logic. |
| `page[number]` | **Optional.** Page number for pagination. |
| `page[size]` | **Optional.** Number of results per page. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [200](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/200) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "registry-modules"`) | The request was successful |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Organization not found |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-7)

```bash
curl \
  --request GET \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules?filter[tags]=project:platform-team,team:infrastructure"
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-5)

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "mod-kwt1cBiX2SdDz38w",
      "type": "registry-modules",
      "attributes": {
        "name": "vpc",
        "namespace": "my-organization",
        "provider": "aws",
        "status": "setup_complete",
        "created_at": "2021-04-07T19:01:18.528Z",
        "tags": [
          {
            "key": "project",
            "value": "platform-team"
          },
          {
            "key": "team",
            "value": "infrastructure"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "links": {
    "self": "https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules?filter%5Btags%5D=project:platform-team,team:infrastructure"
  }
}
```
